sourceMovie.title: Proximity
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Proximity for the same reason it broke through in 2020: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a drama rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Eric Demeusy keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The science fiction and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Spaceman
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Proximity clicked for you, Spaceman (2024) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Proximity?
faq.answer: Try Spaceman, Vesper, The Man Who Fell to Earth—each shares DNA with Proximity while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Proximity?
faq.answer: Proximity (2020) is best described as Science Fiction, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Proximity worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
